stemHtml:
The Secondary Surveillance Radar (SSR) Mode S transponder will transmit a 24-bit Aircraft Address (AA).

This Aircraft Address is…

options.a: An ICAO code corresponding to the aircraft identification number, which is set from the flight deck.
options.b: A unique identification number that is hard-coded into the transponder.
options.c: A unique code associated with the Operator and the flight number.
options.d: The squawk code as assigned by ATC.
